title: Two papers accepted to AAAI 2026
detail:
Two papers have been accepted to AAAI 2026:
1. "Continuum Dropout for Neural Differential Equations" by Jonghun Lee, YongKyung Oh, Sungil Kim, Dongyoung Lim
2. "FlowPath: Learning Data-Driven Manifolds with Invertible Flows for Robust Irregularly-sampled Time Series Classification" by YongKyung Oh, Dongyoung Lim, Sungil Kim
